titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Steinway & Sons Oral History
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Anne Rhodes

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Sunday December 8, 2019 at 01:00

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: OHIV, Steinway & Sons Oral History, Oral History of American Music, in the Music Library of Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Steinway & Sons Oral History traces the history of Steinway & Sons, one of the preeminent manufacturers of pianos, from its years as a family business until its acquisition by CBS in 1972. One-hundred twenty interviews provide a multi-level look at a major musical institution that has made a significant impact on musical culture in the United States and abroad. Interviewees include Steinway family members, piano technicians, factory workers, Steinway agents, and concert pianists.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research. Streaming access to sound recordings in this collection is available when connected to the Yale network, or otherwise by request.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Rights and permissions for OHAM materials vary between individual interviews. Researchers wishing to publish or broadcast OHAM materials are responsible for obtaining direct authorization from copyright holders: generally, the interviewees or their estates.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is arranged alphabetically by surname of interviewee.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This material is restricted. Access may be granted to a patron who has obtained direct permission from the interviewee or their estate.

odd.head: Date note
odd.p: There is a date discrepancy between the date noted on the transcript for this interview which is November 10, 1978, and the date noted in OHAM's previous database containing details for each interview in the collection, which dates this interview as November 11, 1978.

odd.head: Date Note
odd.p: There is a date discrepancy between the date noted on the transcript for this interview which is November 10, 1978, and the date noted in OHAM's previous database containing details for each interview in the collection, which dates this interview as December 14, 1978.
